title: I need script now
wikitext:
[]: I need script now Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 8:54 pm Does anyone know where I can find a word for word, character to character, script for rebuild 2.0 I just downloaded it and there not speaking english (who knew?). Any Please save me from this torture?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Oct 25, 2009 8:56 pm

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 25, 2009 8:58 pm No "please"? Sir I must say I am offended.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:00 pm I doubt very likely theres a script for 1.0 even let alone 2.0 on the net, UBP. And I apologize for my idiot comment on your last thread, I tend to do stupid things early in the morning and late at night But I highly doubt youll find a script. If you have the right video player I think you can download a subtitle prgoram or something I know we have a spanish sub for it somewhere and a Subrip translated in the English as well. But dont get your hopes up for a script of it.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:01 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: I doubt very likely theres a script for 1.0 even let alone 2.0 on the net, UBP. And I apologize for my idiot comment on your last thread, I tend to do stupid things early in the morning and late at night But I highly doubt youll find a script. If you have the right video player I think you can download a subtitle prgoram or something I know we have a spanish sub for it somewhere and a Subrip translated in the English as well. But dont get your hopes up for a script of it.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:02 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: No "please"? Sir I must say I am offended.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:04 pm ...Try this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7007 Subtitles instead of a script but better then nothing.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:10 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: ...Try this: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7007 Subtitles instead of a script but better then nothing.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:22 pm That thread has a link to this: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Evangelion_2.0_%28Translation%29 Not exactly a script but should be better then nothing.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:30 pm thanks (is there a print freindly version?)

[]: Post by Chaos Pudding » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:33 pm Why exactly do you need to print it? Can't you just rename it the same as the name of your 2.0 file and run it in MPC? That's what I do, at least, and it works fine.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:37 pm Chaos Pudding wrote: Why exactly do you need to print it? Can't you just rename it the same as the name of your 2.0 file and run it in MPC? That's what I do, at least, and it works fine.

[]: Post by Chaos Pudding » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:40 pm You know, there are ways of attaching subs to the files themselves so they stay attached when you convert them or transfer them to another device, right? I'm just saying I think it would probably be preferable to formatting the entire sub file for printing.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:43 pm Chaos Pudding wrote: You know, there are ways of attaching subs to the files themselves so they stay attached when you convert them or transfer them to another device, right? I'm just saying I think it would probably be preferable to formatting the entire sub file for printing.

[]: Post by Chaos Pudding » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:44 pm It depends on the speed of your computer. Mine could probably mux the subs and the video file together in that time, but, since your computer doesn't even have sound, I doubt it can do it in that time.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Sun Oct 25, 2009 9:46 pm Chaos Pudding wrote: It depends on the speed of your computer. Mine could probably mux the subs and the video file together in that time, but, since your computer doesn't even have sound, I doubt it can do it in that time.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 25, 2009 10:10 pm UltraBlackPilot wrote: Joseph the PRPD wrote: No "please"? Sir I must say I am offended.

[]: Re: I need script now Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 25, 2009 11:00 pm UltraBlackPilot wrote: Does anyone know where I can find a word for word, character to character, script for rebuild 2.0 I just downloaded it and there not speaking english (who knew?). Any Please save me from this torture?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Oct 25, 2009 8:56 pm

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 25, 2009 8:58 pm No "please"? Sir I must say I am offended.

[]: Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama
